description: Creates a clickable button on the canvas that animates a numeric variable to a target value when pressed.
utility: Create an interactive button that animates a variable to a target value on click

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position of the animator button on the canvas

arguments.name: variable
arguments.description: Reference to a previously defined numeric or point variable

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Target value the variable animates toward when button is clicked

arguments.name: label
arguments.description: Custom button label text in quotes - defaults to 'Apply'

alternates.description: Button that animates variable to target with default label

examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(2,20), 20, type(geometry))
a = 4
I = image(G, "balloon", point(G, -5, 0), 0.1)
R = translate(G, I, 4, a)
animator(at(10,10), a, 2)

G = g2d(at(2,3), 30, 30, type(plotting))
a = 1
plot(G, "a*x^2")
animator(at(2,30), a, 5)
